name: Shoong Golf | ___
address: 615 W La Habra Blvd, La Habra, CA 90631
about: Shoong Golf is an indoor golf practice and lesson studio that combines traditional golfing values with cutting-edge technology. The venue utilizes custom-built simulators equipped with advanced EYE XO2 launch monitors, providing precise data on metrics like ball flight, carry distance, and spin rates. It operates on a flexible membership model with affordable monthly packages, making it suitable for golfers seeking year-round practice regardless of weather.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced EYE XO2 launch monitors with precise shot data
Year-round indoor practice unaffected by weather
Expert club fitting services using state-of-the-art technology
Flexible membership options with no long-term contracts

simulator_hardware.notes: Overhead launch monitor with three high-speed cameras
